productName: Lish Organics - Rosin Dabs - Amnesia Cookies - 1g
description: A chemical-free hybrid rosin, where Amnesia Cookies is pressed between heated plates until pure, golden oil weeps out and cools into a soft, creamy concentrate. Expect a sweet, doughy, earthy dessert aroma with a euphoric, relaxing feel, a rich terpene punch, and an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
